name: Distributed Training
text1: A group is coordinating a training run across home computers in several countries. It's slow and not yet producing dangerous capabilities.
text2: An AI training run is underway across ordinary computers in dozens of countries. No single country hosts the operation.
image-prompt: A world map with hundreds of small glowing nodes connected by thin red lines forming a web, dark background, data visualization style, ominous feel, digital painting, no text
